note: ML model provides learned feature weights replacing heuristic. AUC metrics are NOT generalizable - positives are from the CMS homology database itself. Real value: calibrated weights learned from data vs arbitrary fixed weights.
honest_assessment: Model improves upon heuristic scoring by using data-driven weights. CMS prediction inherently relies on homology to known CMS genes, so metrics are circular. Use ML confidence as a ranking signal, not an absolute probability.
